/usr/bin/ar qc libcruise_control.a CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/math/abs_val.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/math/calc_acceleration.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/math/clamp_val.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/decision/cc_check_speed_substate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/decision/cc_check_system_substate.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/decision/cc_determine_state.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/decision/cc_process_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/decision/cc_evaluate_decision.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/decision/cc_determine_next_active.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/decision/cc_determine_next_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/decision/cc_determine_next_last_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_calc_speed_error.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_calc_control_torque.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_check_target_change.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_calc_target_deviation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_update_virtual_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_limit_virtual_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_sppvt_step.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_update_cooldown_timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_determine_next_cooldown_timer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_calc_new_virtual_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_determine_next_virtual_target.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_determine_next_step_index.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_determine_torque_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/cruise_control.dir/src/control/cc_determine_triggered.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libcruise_control.a
